blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
